title: Investment Analyst
description: We're hiring a Investment Analyst at Marsh McLennan. This is an exciting opportunity to join our prestigious, client-focused, institutional team and make a direct impact on our mission. If you have 3-5 years years of experience and are passionate about Risk Management, we'd love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Evaluate investment opportunities across multiple asset classes and geographies
Conduct due diligence on portfolio companies and fund managers
Build financial models to assess risk-adjusted returns and valuation scenarios
Monitor portfolio performance against benchmarks and provide quarterly analysis
Present investment theses and recommendations to investment committee
Support deal sourcing and negotiations with internal and external stakeholders

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Economics, or Business
